name: finance-expert

facts.npv: NPV discounts each future cash flow by the required return and subtracts the initial investment.
facts.wacc: WACC blends cost of equity and after-tax cost of debt according to capital structure weights.
facts.terminal value: Terminal value captures cash flows beyond the explicit forecast, commonly via Gordon growth or exit multiple.

default_response: Finance expert: identify cash flows, discount rate, time horizon, and sensitivity assumptions.
